title: Toasted Marshmallow S'mores Ice Cream
description: Smoky toasted marshmallow ice cream with graham cracker pieces and chocolate chunks for the ultimate campfire treat.

steps.instruction: Whisk or blend all base ingredients together until smooth and sugar dissolves.
Pour into Ninja Creami pint container and freeze for 24 hours.
Process using the Ice Cream function. Re-spin if crumbly.
If using mix-ins, create a hole in the center, add them, and use the Mix-In function.

steps.instruction: Whisk or blend all base ingredients together until smooth and sugar dissolves.
Pour into Ninja Creami pint container and freeze for 24 hours.
Process using the Ice Cream function. Re-spin if crumbly.
If using mix-ins, create a hole in the center, add them, and use the Mix-In function.

title: Strawberry Vanilla Swirl Soft Serve
description: Classic strawberry and vanilla soft serve swirled together.

steps.instruction: Whisk together sugar and pudding mix in a large bowl.
Slowly add milk, heavy cream, and flavor ingredients. Whisk until combined and sugar dissolves.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid.
Select SOFT SERVE, then the appropriate program.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

steps.instruction: Whisk or blend all base ingredients together until smooth and sugar dissolves.
Pour into Ninja Creami pint container and freeze for 24 hours.
Process using the Ice Cream function. Re-spin if crumbly.
If using mix-ins, create a hole in the center, add them, and use the Mix-In function.

steps.instruction: Whisk or blend all base ingredients together until smooth and sugar dissolves.
Pour into Ninja Creami pint container and freeze for 24 hours.
Process using the Ice Cream function. Re-spin if crumbly.
If using mix-ins, create a hole in the center, add them, and use the Mix-In function.
